'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 25''', also styled '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 25''', was the 25th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[April]] and [[May]] [[2000]] and containing 66 pages. It featured two covers, one with [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and one with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Star News|Feel the Force]]
*[[Star Wars: Force Commander|''Force Commander'']] Preview
*[[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] Poster
*[[In the Star Wars Universe|In the ''Star Wars'' Universe]] — Mike Quinn {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 47|''Star Wars Insider'' 47]]}}
*[[Jawa's Corner]]
*[[In the Star Wars Universe|In the ''Star Wars'' Universe]] — [[Ian Liston]]
*Book Reviews
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Peter Mayhew: Chewie Lives!]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 47|''Star Wars Insider'' 47]]}}
*"[[Creatures of Episode I]]" {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 47}}
*"[[Mara Jade: Flesh and Blood]]" {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 47}}
